gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (1/277)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (1/277)
text: الْمَرْأَةِ الْخَرْسَاءِ كَيْفَ يُلَاعِنُهَا زَوْجُهَا قَالَ يُفَرَّقُ بَيْنَهُمَا وَ لَا تَحِلُّ لَهُ أَبَداً .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ibn Abu Nasr, from Abu Jameela, from Muhammad Bin Marwan,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> regarding the mute woman, how would her husband curse her. He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘There would be separation between the two and she would not be Permissible for him, ever’.
en.sarwar: 20. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from ibn abu Nasr from abu Jamifah from Muhammad ibn Marwan who has said the following: “About the case of a woman who is speechless and about how can he go through the process of al- Li‘an (condemnation) against her, abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘They must be separated from each other and she is not lawful for him in marriage forever.’”
